title: Mining Fatigue Potion
description: This Mod Adds A Potion Of Mining Fatigue To Minecraft 1.20.1!
body:
Have you ever wanted to give someone Mining Fatigue, but didnt have an Elder Guardian nearby?

No?

Well too bad! Cus I wanted to, and now you can too!

This is a pretty simple mod, it just adds a Potion of Mining Fatigue!

The potion can be made into Mining Fatigue I, II, and III, along with Splash Potions, Lingering Potions, and Tipped Arrows! These can all be crafted in survival aswell!
![Brewing Recipe For Potion of Mining Fatigue](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42f957f92b1a0d8f40002bcd9bf33da70d3f84a4.png)

This mod is for Forge 1.20.1, but I am currently in the works of porting this to Fabric 1.20.1, and hopefully 1.21 for both versions!

If you have any issues, please reach out to me on discord, @whirlyswirly
